subject: A heavily armored warrior in full black spiked plate armor, generic FFXIV Dark Knight job class, holding a large greatsword
description: A humanoid figure clad head-to-toe in imposing black plate armor with spiked pauldrons and a horned helmet. The figure stands in a wide, dominant stance, arms raised as if carrying or lifting a massive greatsword across the body. The armor has intricate panel detailing and multiple protruding spikes, giving a menacing silhouette. The palette is almost entirely deep black and dark navy with faint purple highlights where light catches the metal. The background is pale/cream, isolating the figure starkly. This matches the generic FFXIV Dark Knight job aesthetic — no named character identity is visible.
foreground: Black-armored warrior in full spiked plate with greatsword raised
emotion: Imposing and aggressive; wide stance, raised weapon, no readable face
